name: local
context: Local release rehearsal - validate, boot the server, and test search, tree, learn, and bundle health before publishing
info: A local publish rehearsal catches structural and knowledge regressions before they hit a shared registry. This is the safe place to verify that the node can actually be discovered, read, and bundled, and the package-style entry script emits a machine-readable checklist of route health.
triggers: how do i smoke test dojo locally
check search and learn before publishing
body:
# Local Publish Rehearsal

A local publish rehearsal catches structural mistakes before they hit a shared registry.

Run [[dojo/validate]], boot the registry with your `nodes/` tree loaded, and verify `/v1/search`, `/v1/tree/<ecosystem>`, `/v1/skills/<uri>`, `/v1/learn/<uri>`, and `/v1/bundle/<uri>` for the node you changed. The entry script returns a structured checklist so other tooling can gate on the same smoke test.

sections.title: Rehearsal steps
sections.body: Validate the node, start the local server, load the ecosystem tree, then run focused search and learn checks against the exact URIs you changed.

sections.title: Smoke test routes
sections.body: At minimum, verify `/v1/search`, `/v1/tree/<ecosystem>`, `/v1/skills/<uri>`, `/v1/learn/<uri>`, and `/v1/bundle/<uri>`. If the node teaches through links, also check `/v1/backlinks/*` or `/v1/graph/*`.

links.context: Contribution workflow that recommends the local smoke test
Use the read-side client to exercise search and learn routes
Understand what a strong learn payload should contain

related.note: This sub-skill operationalizes the local smoke test step from the contribution guide

scripts.name: Rehearse Release
scripts.description: Check the core routes to validate a local release rehearsal

DOJO_REGISTRY_URL.description: Registry base URL for local smoke tests

author: dojo-community
